programme.title: Samundi
programme.desc: Samundi and his mother move into a nearby hamlet to live peacefully. Terror strikes them once again through the local goon, who spoiled his sister's life. Will he now exact retribution for the past?

programme.title: Nenjinile
programme.desc: A man (Vijay) leaves his family for Mumbai to earn money for his sister's wedding; he becomes a hit man, but is forced to choose when the gang he works for wants to kill his girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Seenu
programme.desc: Kesavan is a popular singer while his younger brother Seenu constantly gets into trouble. Things take a turn when Kesavan falls prey to alcohol addiction and loses his fame.

programme.title: Manasukkul Mathappu
programme.desc: A man is shattered and loses his sanity after the girl he loves dies. In the mental asylum, his doctor in charge falls in love with him. It remains to be seen if this will pull him out of his insanity.

programme.title: Kombu Vecha Singamda
programme.desc: Inspired by Periyar's ideologies, six friends-turned-reformists raise their voice against social evils in their village but in doing so invite the wrath of the local rival forces.

programme.title: Nepaali
programme.desc: Karthik's wife Priya is being harassed by a police officer and as a result she ends her life. But, Karthik is held responsible for her death and imprisoned. While in prison, a social worker offers to help him and clear his name.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Nepaali

programme.title: Raja Maharaja
programme.desc: Two brothers are at loggerheads because of their conflicting personalities; the older one is reliable, while the younger one is reckless. The conflict escalates after the younger brother accidentally kills the father of his brother's girlfriend.

programme.title: Ramaravanan
programme.desc: Thiruchelvam, a terrorist, falls in love with Manomi, a Sinhalese girl. She is aware that he belongs to a group which is engaged in war with the Sinhalese and it will be difficult for them to unite.

programme.title: Thee - Old

programme.desc: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident was a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

programme.title: Poomagal Oorvalam
programme.desc: Sarvanan, adopted by a childless couple, falls in love with Kavitha, the daughter of a caste-obsessed Sengodan. He tries to change Sengodan's attitude in order to marry Kavitha.

programme.title: Vedan
programme.desc: Vijay, a policeman, is on a mission to apprehend Bhoopathy, a criminal. He infiltrates the gang to become his right hand man. But in the bargain, he ends up witnessing the killing of his mentor.

programme.title: Anegan
programme.desc: Madhu, an animator, gets thoughts about her past life, but her psychiatrist believes it to be a figment of her imagination. Madhu happens to meet Ashwin, the man she was in love with in her past life.

programme.title: Naalaya Theerpu
programme.desc: Arun, who has many extra-marital affairs, molests his wife, Mahalakshmi. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets pregnant and has a son.

programme.desc: Karthik's wife Priya is being harassed by a police officer and as a result she ends her life. But, Karthik is held responsible for her death and imprisoned. While in prison, a social worker offers to help him and clear his name.

programme.title: Raja Maharaja
programme.desc: Two brothers are at loggerheads because of their conflicting personalities; the older one is reliable, while the younger one is reckless. The conflict escalates after the younger brother accidentally kills the father of his brother's girlfriend.

programme.title: Ramaravanan
programme.desc: Thiruchelvam, a terrorist, falls in love with Manomi, a Sinhalese girl. She is aware that he belongs to a group which is engaged in war with the Sinhalese and it will be difficult for them to unite.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Thee - Old
programme.desc: Raja and Ravi are two brothers who choose different career paths. While Raja becomes a smuggler, Ravi joins the police force and is ordered to hunt his brother down.

programme.title: Athiradi Vettai
programme.desc: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident was a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

programme.title: Poomagal Oorvalam
programme.desc: Sarvanan, adopted by a childless couple, falls in love with Kavitha, the daughter of a caste-obsessed Sengodan. He tries to change Sengodan's attitude in order to marry Kavitha.

programme.title: Vedan
programme.desc: Vijay, a policeman, is on a mission to apprehend Bhoopathy, a criminal. He infiltrates the gang to become his right hand man. But in the bargain, he ends up witnessing the killing of his mentor.

programme.title: Anegan
programme.desc: Madhu, an animator, gets thoughts about her past life, but her psychiatrist believes it to be a figment of her imagination. Madhu happens to meet Ashwin, the man she was in love with in her past life.

programme.title: Naalaya Theerpu
programme.desc: Arun, who has many extra-marital affairs, molests his wife, Mahalakshmi. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets pregnant and has a son.

programme.title: Movie contd - Naalaya Theerpu
programme.desc: Arun, who has many extra-marital affairs, molests his wife, Mahalakshmi. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets pregnant and has a son.

programme.title: Rasigar Mandram
programme.desc: Kathir and Pandian are rivals who run fan clubs for two different heroes, who take advantage of their animosity. Bharati decides to kill two birds with one stone by engaging the duo in a social cause.

programme.title: Rendum Rendum Aiynthu
programme.desc: Rendum Rendum Anju is a Tamil Feature Film starring Ambika Ravikanth , Sarath Babu and more. The movie is directed by Jayabharathi Jayaraman.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Super Kudumbam
programme.desc: Arun pretends to be married in order to get a house for rent. He picks Shanthi, an uncouth slum girl, to act as his wife. Eventually, circumstances change and they get actually married.

programme.title: Irandu Mugam
programme.desc: Parthasarathy dreams of becoming a minister. With the help of a local leader, he becomes an MLA and also conducts a few shady deals. It is IAS officer Sarveswaran, his secretary, who has other plans.

programme.title: Moive - Sonnalthan Kaadhala
programme.desc: Roja Works At A Finance Company And Her Colleague Murali Is Madly In Love With Her. However, Roja Rejects His Proposal As She Is The Sole Breadwinner Of Her Big Family.

programme.title: Ezhaiyin Sirippil
programme.desc: Ganesan is a bus driver. Kousalya, the daughter of his boss slowly falls for him. But she is shocked when she sees him being accused by a mentally ill woman who holds him responsible for her state.

programme.title: Ninaithen Vanthai
programme.desc: A musician dreams of a beautiful girl and sets out to find her. Soon after, he meets her at a wedding, but by that time his father has already fixed his marriage with someone else.

programme.title: Nandavana theru
programme.desc: Seenu, an orphan and a thief, forms a bond with a wrongly convicted man in the prison and decides to unite him with his niece. Little does he know his life is going to change forever.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Nandhavana Theru
programme.desc: Cast - Karthick,Soundarya

programme.title: Sagaa
programme.desc: Sagaa movie is a Tamil feature film starring Sathis and Siva priya.

programme.title: Sattathukku Oru Savaal
programme.desc: Sattathukku Oru Saval Directed by M. Karnan. with Suman, Madhavi.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: Fillers

programme.title: Aalukkoru Asai-New
programme.desc: Arivalagan plans on leading a happy life by marrying an independent educated girl. However, his life turns upside down when his orthodox grandparents force him to marry an illiterate woman.

programme.title: Ambigai Neril Vandhal
programme.desc: After a lot of persuasion, Devaki agrees to marry Ravi. However, the marriage becomes a bitter struggle for her when she comes to know that Ravi is a drunkard and a womaniser.

programme.title: Sangamam
programme.desc: After a few casual confrontations, a classical dancer and a rural folk artist fall in love with each other. However, the girl's father who disregards folk arts opposes their relationship.

programme.title: Manmatha Leelai
programme.desc: Manmatha Leelai is a 1976 Indian Tamil-language romantic comedy film written and directed by K. Balachander.

programme.title: Simmaraasi
programme.desc: A man's campaign against the caste system earns him much respect from the villagers. Years later, his son who has joined the village goon returns from the city with an arrest warrant for his father.

programme.title: Thulli Thirintha Kaalam
programme.desc: Khushboo faces several difficulties when she tries to discipline a group of youngsters who are idlers and always cause huge embarrassment to their families.

programme.title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
programme.desc: Kaveri's life has been a whirlwind of problems, betrayal & heartbreak until she crosses paths with Arjun. But things take an unexpected turn when Arjun's mother approaches Kaveri to heal the rift with her son. What does the future hold for Kaveri?

programme.title: Sathya
programme.desc: Sathya, who shares a close bond with her sister, values love and compassion above all, while Chamundeswari is driven by wealth and ego. But when fate brings them together, how far will Sathya go to protect her values and her family?

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Sri hari Kalyanam
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones. But their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.title: Moodu Mullu
programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife. Watch Neelaveni & Tarak's destiny unfold.

programme.title: Chattambipaaru

programme.desc: After his wife's demise Anandan is a doting father to his five daughters. As a man of strong values, he's an anchor & guiding light of love even after their marriage. Follow a loving father & his blessed daughters through the ups & downs of life.0

programme.title: Movie contd - Chora chittha chora
programme.desc: Cast - Ravvichandran & others

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Anu Pallavi
programme.desc: Conflicts arise & emotional bonds form when Pallavi, an IAS officer & single mom of a mischievous daughter encounters Vikranth, a single dad & suspended IAS officer. Together, they navigate parenthood, familial struggles & a second chance at love.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Krishna Vamshi
programme.desc: Krishna Vamshi

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Mangalyaa
programme.desc: For Mayuri, family always comes first. For Tarak, bitterness towards his mother fuels every step. As their paths cross, love and revenge blur - witness the fate that binds Mayuri & Tarak together.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Balak Gopal
programme.desc: Balak Gopal

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.
